name: guardrail-review
description: Diff-aware, three-tiered code review guardrails inline in your editor.

commands.title: Guardrail: Toggle Scan Mode (Diff / Whole File)

enumDescriptions: Only flag risk on lines changed vs the committed baseline (recommended).
Flag risk across the entire file.
guardrail.scanMode.description: Whether to analyze only changed lines or the whole file.

guardrail.diffMode.description: Baseline for diff mode: all uncommitted changes (working) or staged only.

guardrail.ai.enabled.description: Enable LLM-powered explanations (requires the provider's API key in your environment, except for local providers).

guardrail.ai.provider.description: LLM provider override (empty = use .guardrails.json). Anthropic uses the Messages API; the rest use the OpenAI-compatible API.

guardrail.ai.model.description: Model id override (empty = use .guardrails.json or the provider default).

guardrail.runGateOnSave.description: Run the project's testCommand automatically on save when high-impact (orange) findings are present.

guardrail.ai.deepReview.model.description: Model override for Deep Review (agentic). Leave empty to use ai.model. Use a stronger model here (e.g. claude-opus-4-8, gpt-4o).

scripts.package: npm run build && vsce package --no-dependencies --out guardrail-review-0.1.1.vsix
